/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/users_service.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/users_service.dir/controllers/AuthController.cc.o -o users_service  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a -lcryptopp /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
